findings.summary: Premature documentation of root causes before fix verification
findings.evidence: Agent wrote prs_dosage_ci failure as init_stage() bug in audit memo before verifying fix, then had to append corrections multiple times
findings.proposed_fix: rule: Do not write root causes into persistent audit memos until fix is deployed and verified
